name: @harperfast/openclaw-memory
description: Distributed long-term agent memory backed by Harper Cortex. Server-side embeddings, multi-agent sharing, zero API keys required.
author: Harper

token.description: Optional authentication token for Cortex instance

table.description: Cortex table name for memory storage

agentId.description: Optional agent identifier for multi-agent isolation

recallLimit.description: Maximum memories to retrieve during auto-recall

recallThreshold.description: Minimum similarity score (0-1) for auto-recall injection

captureLimit.description: Maximum facts to extract during auto-capture
